snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs LowerBracket Finals | Bahasa Indonesia
snippet.description:
Selamat datang di Hari ke-4 Playoffs MPL ID Season 17! 🔥

Jalan menuju Gelar Juara MPL ID S17 mencapai puncaknya saat kita memasuki Final Lower Bracket, sebuah pertarungan berisiko tinggi yang akan menentukan tim terakhir yang melaju ke Grand Final.

Bigetron Esports dan GEEK Fam akan saling berhadapan dalam pertandingan yang mempertaruhkan segalanya. Pemenangnya tidak hanya akan mengamankan tempat di Grand Final, tetapi mereka juga akan mendapatkan tiket yang sangat diidamkan menuju MSC di Esports World Cup (EWC) 2026 di Paris.

Kedua tim telah melewati perjalanan yang luar biasa sepanjang musim ini, menaklukkan berbagai tantangan dan membuktikan diri mereka sebagai yang terbaik di liga. Kini, seluruh jerih payah mereka di musim ini akan ditentukan oleh satu seri penentu. Tidak ada kesempatan kedua—hanya satu tim yang akan melanjutkan perburuan gelar juara dan mengamankan kualifikasi internasional, sementara yang lainnya harus mengakhiri perjalanan mereka.

Akankah Bigetron Esports melanjutkan kebangkitan mereka dan kembali ke panggung terbesar? Atau akankah GEEK Fam melengkapi babak baru dalam kisah terobosan luar biasa mereka?

Jangan lewatkan pertempuran krusial ini saat dua tim terbaik Indonesia bertarung memperebutkan tempat di Grand Final dan tiket ke Paris!

Jangan lewatkan aksinya saat tim-tim terbaik Indonesia bertarung untuk memperebutkan tempat di Paris dan melanjutkan perburuan gelar juara MPL ID S17 mereka!

Infinix GT 50 Pro Kini Telah Hadir! ⚡

https://linktr.ee/InfinixIndo

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

snippet.title: Penat Tapi Kena Kuat - Duka Malam (Official Lyric Video) | Lagu Melayu Sedih 2026
snippet.description:
Penat tapi kena kuat bukan bermaksud kita kena tanggung semua sorang-sorang. Bila rasa terlalu letih sampai tak tahu nak bergantung pada siapa, ingatlah masih ada tuhan yang sentiasa bersama, walaupun kita sendiri tak mampu.

Kadang kita rasa lemah, rasa hampir jatuh, tapi sebenarnya dalam setiap ujian tu tuhan tak pernah tinggalkan kita. Dia bagi kita kekuatan yang kita sendiri tak sedar kita ada, sampai kita boleh terus bertahan walaupun rasa dah tak mampu.

Walau penat macam mana sekalipun, jangan putus harapan dan putus asa. Sebab bila kita hampir rebah, di situ tuhan sedang pegang kita. Dan setiap rasa sakit yang kita lalui, semuanya tak pernah sia-sia di sisi-Nya.

Teruskan walau perlahan, sebab selagi kita masih bergantung pada tuhan, kita tak pernah benar-benar sendiri.

snippet.title: James Arthur - Can I Be Him (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
james arthur - can i be him

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music 🌟

· follow James Arthur:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4IWBUUAFIplrNtaOHcJPRM?si=X7QmRhnTQFOVDKM-ElF5Dw
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/james-arthur/193502798

lyrics:
[verse 1]
you walked into the room
and now my heart's been stolen
you took me back in time to when i was unbroken
now you're all i want
and i knew it from the very first moment
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?
can i be him?

[verse 2]
i heard there was someone but i know he don't deserve you
if you were mine i'd never let anyone hurt you
i wanna dry those tears, kiss those lips
it's all that i've been thinking about
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?

[bridge]
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
oh, can i, can i be him?

[refrain]
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him?

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sang
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there, will you be there
can i be the one you talk about in all your stories
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him

#jamesarthur #canibehim

snippet.title: ROBLOX JANGAN KEJUT NENEK TIDUR !
snippet.description:
Harini aku kena diam-diam supaya nenek aku tak bangun dalam Roblox! Tengok sampai habis untuk tahu apa yang jadi!

SOCIAL MEDIA
Roblox Name: ekmal_speeda
Instagram: ekmalfilms

Apa Itu Roblox?
Roblox ni macam dunia game online tempat korang boleh main, buat game sendiri, lepak dengan orang lain dan explore macam-macam benda best 🎮
Dalam Roblox, semua orang boleh cipta avatar sendiri dan main ribuan game yang dibuat oleh komuniti. Ada game seram 👻, lawak 🤣, simulator 🚗, roleplay 🏠 dan macam-macam lagi.
Korang juga boleh bina dunia sendiri guna tools yang Roblox sediakan. Lagi aktif main dan buat benda cool, lagi banyak item dan Robux korang boleh dapat 💰
Yang paling best, Roblox boleh dimainkan oleh semua peringkat umur 😎

#ekmalspeeda #roblox
